hero.headline: *Sharp lines* that make the difference
hero.subheadline: Interior, exterior, color matching — we show up and get it done right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every surface, inside and out
services_section.subheading: From touch-ups to full repaints — residential and commercial

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Full house painting, trim work, and prep. Scraping, priming, and protecting your investment from Toledo weather.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchens, accent walls. Clean lines and zero mess left behind.

services.title: Color Consultation
services.description: Help picking the right colors for your space. We know what works and what doesn't.

services.title: Surface Prep & Repair
services.description: Patching, sanding, priming. The foundation work that makes the finish coat look professional.

about.heading: Toledo painters who answer the phone
about.body: We're a Toledo painting crew that shows up when scheduled and cleans up when done. Straight lines, fair pricing, no surprises.

reviews.name: Jim G.
reviews.text: Used Hylite several times this year. Recently painted our fireplace, bedroom and bathroom. Unbelievable price and great service. Extremely happy with results.

reviews.name: Jennifer B.
reviews.text: Excellent job on exterior and interior of our home. Perfectly straight edges, very well done. Prompt, professional, and everything cleaned up perfectly.

reviews.name: Christopher B.
reviews.text: Great quality job at a very fair price. They were responsive to our social distancing requests and careful around our landscaping.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Toledo and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting services throughout Northwest Ohio

cta.heading: Ready to start your painting project?
cta.body: Call for a free estimate. We'll walk your property, discuss colors, and give you upfront pricing with no hidden fees.
